Add ARIA attributes to make this form more accessible
output:
function LoginForm() {
  return (
    <form>
      <label htmlFor="email">Email</label>
      <input 
        id="email" 
        type="email" 
        aria-required="true"
        aria-describedby="email-help"
      />
      <label htmlFor="password">Password</label>
      <input 
        id="password" 
        type="password" 
        aria-required="true"
      />
      <button type="submit" aria-label="Login to your account">Login</button>
    </form>
  )
}

import { createPortal } from 'react-dom' interface ModalProps { isOpen: boolean onClose: () => void title: string children: React.ReactNode } function Modal({ isOpen, onClose, title, children }: ModalProps) { if (!isOpen) return null return createPortal(

{title}

{children}
, document.body ) }
